description:
Returns a list of all Inspection Checklist Templates for a specified Project.
See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.
Note: A User with read-only and above permissions to Inspections has access to this endpoint and the URL to individual templates on the web

parameters.name: filters[inspection_type_id]
parameters.description: Array of Inspection Type IDs. Return item(s) associated with the specified Inspection Type IDs.

parameters.name: filters[needs_update]
parameters.description: Boolean. Return template(s) whose configuration is in need of updates.

parameters.name: filters[response_set_id]
parameters.description: Array of Item Response Set IDs. Return list template(s) whose items are associated with the given Response Set IDs.

parameters.name: filters[trade_ids]
parameters.description: Array of Trade IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Trade IDs.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Sorts the list of Checklist Templates on the attribute given. By default the list is in ascending order. Use '-attribute' to sort in descending order.
Ex. 'sort=-trade'.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Trade

list_template_id.description: Company List Template ID that List Template is Synced to
